page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9it.24xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance based on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. The instance provides 96 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 96 physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead.

The instance is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage, meaning storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its dedicated hardware allocation and balanced resource density, this instance offers high compute predictability for enterprise workloads. The 1:4 CPU-to-memory ratio makes it suitable for general-purpose workloads, multi-threaded applications, web serving, and database hosting that require consistent CPU performance without resource sharing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9it.24xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.2 GHz, delivering 96 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The hardware profile includes 384.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core, with no local storage bundled. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps. Lacking hyperthreading, this instance provides predictable compute performance, making it highly suitable for multi-threaded applications, enterprise web serving, and database workloads requiring dedicated resource allocation.

tagline: A dedicated 96-core Intel Xeon instance with a balanced memory-to-CPU ratio and high-speed baseline network performance for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 96 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores with no hyperthreading
384.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 resource ratio
64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput connectivity
No local storage included, requiring network-attached storage solutions
KVM hypervisor-based virtualization with dedicated CPU allocation
Well-suited for enterprise web serving, databases, and multi-threaded applications
